options.name: -help
options.description: Prints out the command usage

options.name: <model_filename>
options.description: Specifies the name of the output file

options.name: -abs_tol_val
options.description: Specifies the absolute tolerance value to be used during the validation of extracted ETM. For more details refer 'compare_model_timing -absolute_tolerance'. This can be used only when '-validate' is used with model extraction. The integer value specified with this switch is read as ns/ps depending upon the time unit. Default 3ps

options.name: -abs_tol_val_optimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the absolute tolerance limit for flagging an optimistic failure. An optimistic path violating absolute as well as percentage tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 15ps. This can be used only when '-validate' is used with model extraction.

options.name: -abs_tol_val_pessimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the absolute tolerance limit for flagging a pessimistic failure. A pessimistic path violating absolute as well as percentage tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 15ps. This can be used only when '-validate' is used with model extraction.

options.name: -assertions
options.description: Dumps the constraints for model, which is used in validation flow

options.name: -cell_name
options.description: Specifies the cell name used in the timing model

options.name: -check
options.description: Checks the generated ETM library using Valus.

options.name: -clock_slews
options.description: Specifies a range of slew values used at all clock pins

options.name: -format
options.description: Specifies the format for extracted model in tlf, dotlib, syntech

options.name: -gain
options.description: Represents an increase in the number of delay arcs if a pin is removed

options.name: -include_aocv_weights
options.description: writes stage weights on individual arcs

options.name: -include_power
options.description: Writes information of power consumed by the block

options.name: -input_slews
options.description: {<input_slew1 input_slew2>...} Specifies a range of slew values used at all data input ports

options.name: -lib_name
options.description: Specifies the library name used in the timing model

options.name: -max_num_loads
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of output load values

options.name: -max_num_slews
options.description: Specifies the maximum number of input slews or clock slews

options.name: -output_loads
options.description: {<output_load1 output_load2>...} Specifies a range of load values used at all output ports

options.name: -per_tol_val
options.description: Specifies the percentage tolerance value to be used during the validation of extracted ETM. For more details refer 'compare_model_timing -percent_tolerance'. This can be used only when '-validate' is used with model extraction. Default 3%

options.name: -per_tol_val_optimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the percentage tolerance limit for flagging an optimistic failure. An optimistic path violating percentage as well as absolute tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 3%. This can be used only when '-validate' is used with model extraction.

options.name: -per_tol_val_pessimistic
options.description: This switch will specify the percentage tolerance limit for flagging a pessimistic failure. A pessimistic path violating percentage as well as absolute tolerance limit will be flagged as FAIL in compare_model_timing output report. Default value of this switch is 3%. This can be used only when '-validate' is used with model extraction.

options.name: -pg
options.description: Writes the power ground information for pins

options.name: -precision
options.description: Specifies the floating point precision used for the timing model

options.name: -resolution
options.description: Specifies the magnitude of delay difference that can be ignored in extraction

options.name: -tolerance
options.description: Specifies the accuracy level of extractor in percent

options.name: -validate
options.description: This switch enables the validation of generated ETM for corresponding view and displays number of failures at the end of validation. It is mandatory to specify the name of validation directory with this option (-validate valDir), this contains the write_model_timing, compare_model_timing and summary reports.

options.name: -verilog_shell_file
options.description: Generates a Verilog shell file that instantiates the timing model

options.name: -verilog_shell_module
options.description: Specifies the top module name of the Verilog shell file

options.name: -view
options.description: Specifies the view for which model needs to extracted
